name: DRepTalk
description_short: A calmer, accountable home for Cardano governance where DReps, SPOs, CC members and proposers discuss on-chain actions.
description_long:
DRepTalk is the public deliberation platform for Cardano governance. It automatically imports every on-chain governance action into a dedicated discussion thread, so DReps, SPOs, Constitutional Committee members and proposers can debate a proposal before they vote on it.

Anyone can read along publicly. To post, participants authenticate with a wallet signature, which ties each contribution to a verifiable on-chain identity. Alongside the forum, DRepTalk surfaces DRep profiles, voting records, vote rationales, epoch movers and a live governance activity feed, giving delegators the context they need to choose and hold a DRep accountable.

products.name: DRepTalk
products.description: Governance discussion forum and DRep directory for Cardano, with per-action threads, voting records and rationales.
